title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A video essay exploring the mathematical concept of taking logarithms of images using complex analysis and conformal maps, inspired by Escher's Print Gallery. The video demonstrates how the complex exponential and logarithm functions can transform and reveal hidden structure in artwork through visualization and animation.
